case_title: AVIGNON JULIAN LLC VS. KAMILLA COX et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVIGNON JULIAN LLC SERVED FEB-18-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COX, KAMILLA
